selection_note: No files in the available corpora (holdout_suite + benchmark_suite) strictly match all voyager-class criteria (no transparent GCEs + ≥90% None/Keep disposal + ≥50% offset subframes + global palette). The corpus below represents the best available candidates that match the most critical criteria: no transparent GCEs, 100% None/Keep disposal, and global palette. Offset subframes are 0% for all candidates, which is a significant deviation from the ≥50% requirement. This suggests the voyager-class definition may be too narrow for the available corpus, or the corpus needs to be expanded with files that have more offset subframes.

inclusion_criteria.disposal_method: ≥90% of frames use None or Keep disposal (actual: 100%)
inclusion_criteria.offset_subframes: ≥50% of frames have non-zero left/top offset (actual: 0% - CAVEAT)
inclusion_criteria.stable_palette: Color distribution is relatively consistent across frames

selected_files.name: 790106_0203_voyager_58m_to_31m_reduced
selected_files.rationale: Voyager space probe animation. Meets: no transparent GCEs, 100% None/Keep disposal, global palette. Caveat: 0% offset subframes (full-frame animation). 60 frames of consistent structure suggest stable palette. Named 'voyager' in filename, making it semantically aligned with voyager-class intent.

selected_files.name: pangea_animation_03
selected_files.rationale: Geological animation showing continental drift. Meets: no transparent GCEs, 100% None/Keep disposal, global palette. Caveat: 0% offset subframes. 38 frames with consistent color palette across geological time-lapse sequence.

selected_files.name: apparent_retrograde_motion_of_mars_in_2003
selected_files.rationale: Astronomical animation of Mars retrograde motion. Meets: no transparent GCEs, 100% None/Keep disposal, global palette. Caveat: 0% offset subframes. 79 frames with stable color palette (black background, consistent planet colors).

selected_files.name: 8_cell_simple
selected_files.rationale: Mathematical 4D polytope visualization. Meets: no transparent GCEs, 100% None/Keep disposal, global palette. Caveat: 0% offset subframes. 48 frames with stable color palette (geometric shapes with consistent coloring).

caveats: No files in the available corpus have ≥50% offset subframes. All selected files are full-frame animations (0% offset). This is a significant deviation from the voyager-class definition.

The voyager-class definition may be too narrow for the available corpus. Consider either: (a) relaxing the offset subframes requirement, (b) expanding the corpus with files that have more offset subframes, or (c) reconsidering whether offset subframes are actually necessary for the study.
The 'offenders' manifest in holdout_suite contains only 3 files, none of which meet the offset subframes criterion.
The benchmark_suite contains no files that meet the strict criteria (all have 0% offset subframes).
next_steps: Proceed with Phase 2 (candidate implementation) using these 4 files as the voyager-class corpus.
During Phase 3 (encoding & measurement), document whether the lack of offset subframes affects the validity of the study conclusions.
Consider whether the study should be split into two phases: (a) full-frame animations (current corpus), and (b) offset-subframe animations (if corpus can be expanded).
target_dimensions: To be determined in Phase 2. Recommend a common target size (e.g., 320x240 or 640x480) for all candidates and baselines.
